questions.question: A network interface has a packet drop rate of 2% and 1000 packets are transmitted per second. How many packets are dropped per second?
questions.hint: Calculate the number of packets dropped based on the given rate

questions.question: In a network with a total of 1000 devices, 200 devices are connected to a switch that supports 1000 ports. What is the packet drop rate for this switch?
questions.hint: Calculate the packet drop rate based on the number of devices and ports

questions.question: A router has a queue size of 100 packets and a packet arrival rate of 50 packets per second. If the queue is full, what is the packet drop rate?
questions.hint: Calculate the packet drop rate based on the queue size and packet arrival rate
